rawAssistant: A bold soul, eager to tackle the spire, eh? Rest and preparation are key. Your Thornbeast is well-trained, but the spire's unforgiving nature demands discipline. Take a moment to review your formation with Gremlin; balance will be crucial at that height. I'll offer you one final bit of advice: don't underestimate the value of a good night's rest – especially when facing the unknown dangers above.
